00:08:28	Luis Pinto | Besu:	I feel the meeting should be more about LUCID as a proposal as a headliner and why do people think it’s not ready for Hegotá
00:09:22	Anders Elowsson:	Replying to "I could use 5 min pi..."

Easier to review changes relative to the LUCID research post. The biggest changes: 

The ToB fee is moved to be public within the ST ticket

The transaction is executed against the previous block header
